caption: Raven, a fierce cyberpunk icon, drops into the neon‑lit sky bridge over megacity, her silhouette framed by rain‑slick glass and holographic billboards. She rides a drone‑lift through the night, flashing in neon teal and magenta, turning heads with her avant‑garde style. Her crew cheers as the city pulses behind her, a symphony of light and steel. ⚡💫 #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neon
